description:
Goal:
Store minimal user identity data encrypted at rest.

Scope:
- profile model
- local database
- envelope encryption abstraction
- KEK/DEK handling suitable for local MVP
- create/read/update/delete profile commands or service functions

Acceptance:
- Profile can be saved and read back.
- Stored sensitive fields are encrypted at rest.
- No SSN field exists.
- DOB field is optional and documented as guided-manual only.
- No plaintext PII appears in logs or test output.
title: Implement encrypted profile store foundation
